query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(avgRepurchaseDays) as has_value,
  AVG(avgRepurchaseDays) as avg_val,
  MIN(avgRepurchaseDays) as min_val,
  MAX(avgRepurchaseDays) as max_val
FROM customers WHERE totalOrders > 1
